name: /standards-monitor exits cleanly on a simulated shutdown signal between iterations
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: []\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-monitor.sh" --watch --once --registry .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml --simulate-shutdown 2>out.txt && grep -q 'shutdown=clean' out.txt && grep -q 'iteration_completed=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
